---
name: Research note
about: Propose a narrowly scoped evidence-backed correction or follow-up
title: "[research] "
labels: research
assignees: ""
---

## Claim or Correction

State the proposed correction or follow-up in one short paragraph.

## Witnesses / Scope

List the affected witnesses, windows, or docs.

## Evidence

Include the strongest concrete evidence only.

## Confidence

- low
- medium
- high

## Promotion Standard

Explain what would need to be true before this belongs in promoted public docs.
